storage_policy.reason: Followup377 keeps scalar global material stress-correction FD/JVP consistency here and reuses the existing detailed material tangent and support-matrix receipts.

global_axial_stress_correction_fd_consis.pass_rule: eligible stable active non-proxy rows require relative error <= 1e-4 and absolute error <= max(0.1, 1e-8 * max_signal)

assessment: Followup377 upgrades material Newton evidence from local stress-derivative consistency to a global 12-DOF frame axial material stress-correction force/JVP consistency check. The residual-side axial stress correction and dense element tangent agree with finite-difference JVPs for stable active non-proxy service and controlled-probe states. This narrows the global material residual/Jacobian gap, but it still does not close full path-dependent material Newton because shell/plate material nonlinearity, fiber-section history variables, cyclic/path history updates, and a production global nonlinear material Newton iteration remain outside this receipt.
